violations.text: The floors underneath shelving has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by new droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2024

The floor underneath shelving in various aisles has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2024
Various foods were observed gnawed into. Food was disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by large amount of droppings in chip, pet food, and bread aisle. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024
2 dead rodents were observed on glue boards in the facility. Dead rodents shall be removed from facility. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving in the pet food, chip, and bread aisle have an accumulation of rodent droppings. Establishment started to clean shelving at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024

The floors in the back storage and underneath shelving has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back storage area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings in various locations (bakery, back storage area, deli, etc.) The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024

The floor in the bakery area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. Various locations have an accumulation of old and new rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Establishment to clean facility and relay locations to pest control where rodent droppings were observed. Establishment to move pallets, dollies, racks, etc away from walls to allow pest control to easily treat areas. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (bakery knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/26/2023
Dead mouse were observed near bait station in stockroom room area . Dead rodents/pests shall be removed from the premises. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/26/2023

The door to the outside, located in the stockroom, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2023

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the bakery and prepared foods area. New Violation. Correct By: 10/26/2023
Handwashing sink located in the meat department area was not in good repair(leak from hose). New Violation. Correct By: 10/26/2023

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of debris: 1.ceiling vents and cooler fans in deli and seafood dept observed with dust. 2.honey comb vents in dairy case observed with dust and soil residue. 3.racks in the dairy case observed with biofilm 4.fresh produce, vegan case, and pre packaged vegetable case has accumulation of biofilm under air vents. New Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2023

The sink used for food preparation in the produce dept is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items(slicers) were observed in the Deli Dept area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/26/2023
